top_signals.name: funding
top_signals.notes: Best signal by far. Crypto-only, 3h/4h horizon gated.

top_signals.name: calendar
top_signals.notes: Strong BUY-only signal. Never votes SELL.

top_signals.name: econ_calendar
top_signals.notes: Strong SELL-only signal (risk-off near events). Anti-correlated with calendar.

top_signals.name: qwen3
top_signals.notes: Best LLM signal. BUY accuracy only 30% but SELL accuracy 74%.

top_signals.name: rsi
top_signals.notes: Solid workhorse. 50% activity rate - most active core signal.

worst_signals.name: trend
worst_signals.notes: WORST all-time at 3h. But surging to 61.6% recently! Regime-dependent - works in trends, fails in ranges.

worst_signals.name: oscillators
worst_signals.notes: Consistently bad. 83.4% agreement with heikin_ashi - redundant AND bad.

worst_signals.name: fibonacci
worst_signals.notes: Bad overall. 17.1% agreement with mean_reversion (systematic disagreement). But 68.2% recent 1d - improving.

worst_signals.name: macd
worst_signals.notes: Only 7.4% active. When it does vote, its wrong 56% of the time.

worst_signals.name: macro_regime
worst_signals.notes: 99.7% agreement with trend signal - essentially duplicate vote. Both bad at 3h.

worst_signals.name: sentiment
worst_signals.notes: CRITICAL - crashed from 46.5% to 33.8% recently. 9.2% activity, 8.4% BUY only. Actively harmful.

worst_signals.name: fear_greed
worst_signals.notes: All-time ok (53.9%) but recent 1d crashed to 25.9%. Contrarian approach failing.

correlation_clusters.name: mega_trend_cluster
correlation_clusters.problem: 8 signals voting nearly identically. This is 8 votes for the price of 1. Massively inflates trend-following consensus.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Designate trend OR heikin_ashi as cluster leader. Penalize remaining 6 signals at 0.15-0.2x weight.

correlation_clusters.name: calendar_conflict
correlation_clusters.problem: calendar is always BUY. econ_calendar is always SELL. They perfectly cancel each other. Net information = zero.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: These are actually measuring different things and shouldnt be in consensus together. Calendar seasonal BUY tendency and event-risk SELL tendency are both valid but need separate treatment.

correlation_clusters.name: reversal_cluster
correlation_clusters.problem: fibonacci systematically disagrees with mean_reversion (17.1% agreement) and is wrong (43.3%). Creates noise.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Gate fibonacci more aggressively. RSI + mean_reversion provide valid reversal signal.

activity_rate_issues.issue: Way above 70% cap. 56.3% BUY bias. Should be penalized for hyperactivity.
High activity + low accuracy (43.3%) = high noise.
59.7% BUY, only 6.0% SELL. Extreme bullish bias.

directional_bias_issues.issue: ONLY BUY. Never SELL. Not a real signal - its a permanent bull vote.
ONLY SELL. Never BUY. Not a real signal - its a permanent bear vote.
ONLY SELL. Good accuracy (58.5%) but unidirectional.
11.5:1 BUY:SELL ratio. Almost never calls SELL.
10:1 BUY:SELL ratio. Almost never SELL. AND 33.8% recent accuracy.

trending_up.notes: Trend-following signals improving recently, suggesting market is in trending regime

ranging.notes: Mean-reversion signals work in ranging, trend signals fail

recommendations.detail: Sentiment at 33.8% recent should be gated by 47% threshold. Check if recency-weighted blend is catching this or if all-time (46.5%) is keeping it barely alive.

8 signals (trend, macro_regime, structure, heikin_ashi, momentum_factors, oscillators, volatility_sig) are 85-99.7% correlated. Current static groups may not fully capture this. Verify dynamic correlation is detecting this cluster.
These two signals perfectly cancel. Calendar BUY + econ_calendar SELL = zero net. Consider treating as separate utility signals rather than consensus voters.
calendar (BUY-only), econ_calendar (SELL-only), news_event (SELL-only) should have directional bias penalty. They inflate one side of consensus.

recommendations.action: Verify activity rate cap is working
recommendations.detail: volume_flow (87.7%), mean_reversion (76.7%), momentum (72.7%) all exceed 70% cap. Check that 0.5x penalty is being applied correctly.
